## Meeting Purpose

[Demonstrate GrowthX's AI-powered content creation capabilities to TechBlocks and discuss potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-assisted content creation with human editing, focusing on quality and SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Their process involves deep research, customized workflows, and ongoing optimization](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [TechBlocks is interested but has concerns about AI content quality and Google rankings](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [GrowthX's base package is $49K/month for 50,000 words (8-15 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

## Topics

### AI Content Quality and SEO Performance

  - [GrowthX uses multiple LLMs and human editors to ensure high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Focus on creating engaging content that fulfills user intent, not just AI-generated text](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Showed example of successful SEO growth for a client (Tiro) within 3 months of content creation](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Involves deep research, persona development, and customized workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [12-week onboarding process to calibrate content and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Uses tools like Notion and Slack for collaboration and communication](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Offers both editorial and programmatic content creation](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### Content Distribution and Thought Leadership

  - [Can repurpose content across multiple channels (e.g. blog posts from podcasts/webinars)](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=2185.0)
  - [Open to exploring thought leadership content creation, though primary focus is SEO-driven articles](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)

### TechBlocks' Current Content Efforts

  - [Using AI tools like ChatGPT for research and content inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Planning to launch a thought leadership video series](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=2875.0)
  - [Has concerns about effectively using high volume of content (15 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=2668.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bruno to send TechBlocks a basic editorial proposal](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=3179.0)
  - [TechBlocks to review proposal and consider if GrowthX's services align with their needs](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=3220.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call to discuss proposal and next steps if interested](https://fathom.video/share/xemtDzqUgFrsUmynH9syQDF5qSU8spp2?tab=summary&timestamp=3490.0)
